{{ill|Q106436058|qid=Q106436058|1=In no Ue}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}|mother={{ill|Minamoto no Meishi|qid=Q11564114|1=Minamoto no Meishi}}|relatives={{ill|Chōshin|qid=Q11651502|1=Chōshin}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Akinobu|qid=Q11623643|1=Fujiwara no Akinobu}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Ishi|qid=Q5507516|1=Fujiwara no Ishi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kanshi|qid=Q15645727|1=Fujiwara no Kanshi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi|qid=Q5507521|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Kishi|qid=Q11623137|1=Fujiwara no Kishi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagaie|qid=Q11623254|1=Fujiwara no Nagaie}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Norimichi|qid=Q3090649|1=Fujiwara no Norimichi}}; {{ill|Fujiwara no Shōshi|qid=Q901949|1=Empress Shōshi}}; {{Basic information: Court Noble
 | Name = Fujiwara no Yorimune (藤原 頼宗)
 | image =
 | image size =
 | image description =
 | Era = Mid Heian period
 | Birth = {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 4 (993)
 | Death = {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} 8, February 3 (old calendar) (1065, March 12)
 | Official Rank = {{ill|Jūichi-i|ja|従一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūichi-i|1=Junior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11071121}}, {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|qid=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin|1=Minister of the Right}}
 | Lord = Served under {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|qid=Q449540|lt=Ichijō Tennō|1=Emperor Ichijō}}, {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|qid=Q357231|lt=Sanjō Tennō|1=Emperor Sanjō}}, {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Go-ichijō Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}}, and {{ill|Emperor Go-Suzaku|en|Emperor Go-Suzaku|qid=Q349296|lt=Go-Suzaku Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Suzaku}}, and {{ill|Emperor Go-Reizei|en|Emperor Go-Reizei|qid=Q356060|lt=Go-Reisei Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Reizei}}
 | Clan = Fujiwara Hokke – {{ill|Mido-ryū|ja|中御門流|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mido-ryū|1=Nakamikado-ryū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11365017}}
 | Parents = Father: {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}, Mother: {{ill|Minamoto no Takaaki's daughter|ja|源高明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Takaaki's daughter|1=Minamoto no Takaakira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564373}} (also known as 【ill|Takamatsuden|ja|高松殿】)
 | Siblings = Sister: {{ill|Empress Shōshi|en|Empress Shōshi|qid=Q901949|lt=Fujiwara no Akiko|1=Empress Shōshi}}, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|en|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|qid=Q1370620|lt=Fujiwara no Yorimitsu|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}}, Yorimune, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|en|Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|qid=Q5507521|lt=Fujiwara no Yasuko|1=Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)}}, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Akinobu|ja|藤原顕信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Akinobu|1=Fujiwara no Akinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623643}}, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Nōshin|ja|藤原能信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Nōshin|1=Fujiwara no Yoshinobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623489}}, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Norimichi|en|Fujiwara no Norimichi|qid=Q3090649|lt=Fujiwara no Noritsuna|1=Fujiwara no Norimichi}}, Sister: {{ill|Fujiwara no Kanako|ja|藤原寛子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kanako|1=藤原寛子|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15645762}}, Sister: {{ill|Fujiwara no Ishi|en|Fujiwara no Ishi|qid=Q5507516|lt=Fujiwara no Iko|1=Fujiwara no Ishi}}, Sister: {{ill|Fujiwara no Sonko|ja|藤原尊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Sonko|1=Fujiwara no Sonshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623207}}, Brother: {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagaie|en|Fujiwara no Nagaie|qid=Q11623254|lt=Fujiwara no Nagayoshi|1=Fujiwara no Nagaie}}, Sister: {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoriko|ja|藤原嬉子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Yoriko|1=Fujiwara no Kishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623137}}, and Long Shinn.
 | Wife = Primary wife: daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Korechika|en|Fujiwara no Korechika|qid=Q5507530|lt=Fujiwara no Ishu|1=Fujiwara no Korechika}}; also, another wife: daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Chikatoshi|ja|藤原親時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Chikatoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
 | Children = Son: {{ill|Fujiwara no Kaneyori|ja|藤原兼頼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kaneyori|1=Fujiwara no Kaneyori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17225663}}; (other children include a daughter named Tadako, and sons such as {{ill|Fujiwara no Toshia|ja|藤原俊家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Toshia|1=Fujiwara no Toshiie|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623032}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Mototada|ja|藤原基貞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Mototada|1=Fujiwara no Motosada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623126}}, and others)
 | Remarks = Recognized as the founder of the 【ill|Mido-ryū|ja|中御門流】.
}}
'''Fujiwara no Yorimune''' (藤原 頼宗) was a mid‐Heian period court noble and poet, also known by the title “Horikawa Udaijin.” He was the second son of the illustrious regent {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}. His career advanced more slowly than that of his half‐brothers due to differences in maternal lineage.
